channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Murray runs for a TD, leads Cardinals to game-winning FG and 17-15 win over Chargers
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Arizona's Kyler Murray rolled out to his left before turning on the jets, beating a Chargers defender to the sideline and then coasting for a spectacular 44-yard touchdown, casually holding the ball with one hand like it was a backyard game.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lamar Jackson throws for 281 yards, 5 TDs to lead streaking Ravens to 41-31 victory over Buccaneers
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Lamar Jackson, who may be playing the best football of his career, made it look easy.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Aaron Gordon agrees to a four-year, $133 million extension with the Denver Nuggets
item.description: DENVER (AP) — The Denver Nuggets secured another one of their core players by agreeing with forward Aaron Gordon on a four-year, $133 million contract extension Monday night.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tests confirm a season-ending knee injury for 49ers receiver Brandon Aiyuk
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco 49ers star receiver Brandon Aiyuk will miss the rest of the season after tearing ligaments in his right knee.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jack Nicklaus surprises veterans at annual golf tournament
item.description: Jack Nicklaus made a surprise appearance at the annual PGA of America golf tournament for veterans, taking the opportunity to express his gratitude for their service.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Air Force refuses to let fan wear 'Keep Women's Sports Female' shirt at volleyball match vs San Jose State
item.description: A fan told OutKick that Air Force Academy security didn't allow him to wear a shirt saying "Keep Women's Sports Female" at a match against the controversial San Jose State squad.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Yankees and Dodgers meet in World Series for 12th time in matchup of Broadway and Hollywood
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Broadway vs. Hollywood. Subway vs. Freeway. Judge vs. Ohtani. New York neighbors who became cross-country rivals, the Yankees and Dodgers renew their starry struggle in the World Series for the first time in 43 years.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Russell Wilson throws for 2 TDs, runs for another TD in Pittsburgh debut as Steelers rout Jets 37-15
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Russell Wilson sat at the podium, uniform still on, in no rush to move on from a moment he believed would always come. Even as the weeks passed and his aching calf struggled to get better. Even as Justin Fields deftly guided the Pittsburgh Steelers in his place.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Dodgers finish off Mets with 10-5 win in NLCS
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani carried the injury-riddled Los Angeles Dodgers to baseball's best record during the regular season. Tommy Edman joined the team in late July and helped them reach the World Series. It's been that kind of year for the big-spending Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Dodgers finish off Mets with 10-5 win in NLCS and advance to face Yankees in World Series
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani carried the injury-riddled Los Angeles Dodgers to baseball's best record during the regular season. Tommy Edman joined the team in late July and helped them reach the World Series. It's been that kind of year for the big-spending Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NFL stadiums will lose $11B from climate threats by 2050: Report
item.description: “This report is a wake-up call for the NFL, stadium owners, and local governments,” said Climate X CEO Lukky Ahmed.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Browns QB Watson suffers likely season-ending Achilles injury. Teammates upset some fans cheered
item.description: Deshaun Watson's tumultuous tenure with Cleveland has taken another significant turn. His third season appears to be over.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: WNBA Finals reach Game 5 for first time since 2019, Liberty head back to New York
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — It's fitting that a record-breaking season for the WNBA would come down to a winner-take-all Game 5 of its Finals. For the first time since 2019, the league championship will go the distance. This one will be in New York on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: CMU inducts BJ Russell into the Hall of Honor
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Colorado Mesa University recently honored two former athletes, linebacker BJ Russell and volleyball setter Jordyn Moody, for their outstanding contributions to CMU athletics.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Kyle Larson opens the third round of NASCAR's playoffs as the title favorite
item.description: Kyle Larson has been lucky of late in Las Vegas, where he opens the third round of NASCAR's playoffs on top of the Cup Series standings and the favorite to win Sunday's race.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Alonso and Mets extend season again, beating Dodgers 12-6 to send NLCS back to LA for Game 6
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Not easy to knock out these New York Mets. Pete Alonso golfed an early three-run homer and the Mets hammered an ineffective Jack Flaherty, extending the National League Championship Series with a 12-6 victory over the Los Angeles Dodgers in Game 5 on Friday.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lonzo Ball makes long-awaited return from knee injuries, scores 10 in Bulls' preseason game
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — When the moment finally arrived, after multiple knee surgeries and one grueling rehab, Lonzo Ball raised his right arm and blew a kiss to the cheering United Center crowd. Fans rose to their feet as the announcement echoed through the arena: “Checking in for the Chicago Bulls! No.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Denver Broncos at New Orleans Saints: TV channel, time, what to know
item.description: The Denver Broncos face the New Orleans Saints on the road for Thursday Night Football; an anticipated match against coach Sean Payton's former team.
item.dc:creator: Sean O'Donnell, ABC 4

item.title: Injured Alex Cobb dropped from Guardians' ALCS roster, replaced by Ben Lively
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pitcher Alex Cobb was dropped from Cleveland's American League Championship Series roster on Tuesday after he got hurt yet again in the opener, leaving the Guardians in search of a Game 5 starter against the New York Yankees. “It’s been a challenging year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5
